component_patterns.buttons: bg-primary text-white rounded-xl py-4 px-6 font-bold shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(138,43,226,0.4)] active:opacity-80 flex flex-row justify-center items-center
component_patterns.buttons_secondary: bg-transparent border border-primary/50 text-primary rounded-xl py-4 px-6 font-bold active:opacity-80 flex flex-row justify-center items-center
component_patterns.buttons_danger: bg-danger text-white rounded-xl py-4 px-6 font-bold active:opacity-80 flex flex-row justify-center items-center
component_patterns.bottom_nav: bg-background border-t border-white/10 py-3 px-6 flex flex-row justify-between items-center
component_patterns.inventory_slot: aspect-square rounded-xl border-2 bg-surface justify-center items-center overflow-hidden relative
component_patterns.badge: px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

login.layout: Fullscreen image background (`background_mystical_forest`). Dark overlay gradient at the bottom. Glassmorphism card in center.
login.elements: Glowing game title. Input fields with white/10 background, white text, and primary border on focus. Solid primary 'Enter Realm' button.

character_profile.elements: Top section: Large Avatar image with glowing circular frame, level badge overlay, and HP/Mana progress bars. Bottom section: Bento grid for equipped gear slots (Weapon, Armor, Accessory, Consumable). Floating glass panels for detailed stats (ATK, DEF, MAG).

scanner.elements: Overlay the `scanner_frame` image covering the edges. Add a glowing cyan scanning line moving up and down. A subtle 'Scan Barcode' prompt at the top. On scan success, a Bottom Sheet pops up revealing the generated item with its rarity.

inventory.elements: Top section: Filter chips (All, Weapons, Armor, Consumables). Grid items: use `inventory_slot` pattern, color-code borders by rarity. Display item count badge. Tapping an item opens `item_detail` modal.

item_detail.layout: Bottom sheet or centered Modal with blur backdrop.
item_detail.elements: Large centered item image. Rarity badge and Name at the top. Stat deltas (e.g., ATK +15, Level 5). Description/Lore text. Action buttons: Equip, Upgrade, List on Market, Destroy (danger button).

upgrade.elements: Dual slot visual: Main item on left, Upgrade scroll/material on right, connected by a glowing '+' icon. 'Upgrade' CTA button with glow effect. Display success chance (%) and current vs next level stats (cap = character level).

trading_house.layout: Header background `trading_house_bg`. FlatList of items for sale.
trading_house.elements: Search bar and Filter at the top. 'Post Listing' CTA button. Listing modal includes min/max price guardrails. Item cards display seller name, item icon, rarity border, and price.

background_mystical_forest.description: Background for Login and ambient app screens

scanner_frame.description: Overlay for the Barcode Scanner screen

trading_house_bg.description: Header background for the Trading House screen

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard React Native / Expo components (View, Text, Image, ImageBackground, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, FlatList).
Use NativeWind for styling. The tailwind classes provided should be mapped to the `className` props of your components.
Implement the 'Dark Fantasy Anime' aesthetic using Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury. Apply the dark backgrounds and vibrant rarity colors to borders/shadows.
For the scanner screen, use `expo-camera` or `react-native-vision-camera`. Position the `scanner_frame` image absolutely over the camera view with pointerEvents='none'.
Use translucent backgrounds with subtle borders (simulating glassmorphism) for cards and modals to let the rich background imagery show through.
Implement the bottom tab navigation with the following tabs: Character, Scan, Inventory, Market.
Ensure all interactive and key informational elements have `data-testid` props for automated testing.
Do NOT use placeholder URLs (like via.placeholder.com). Use the provided image URLs as fallbacks and backgrounds.
